prompt: Create a cinematic photorealistic portrait of a rugged young adult man with dark messy curly hair, light stubble, sharp cheekbones, intense eyes, and a serious expression standing outdoors in a misty alpine mountain landscape. He is shown from the chest up in a three-quarter pose, body turned slightly away while looking directly back at the camera over his shoulder. He wears a weathered dark brown-black leather jacket with a raised collar, visible seams, worn texture, and subtle rain or dust marks. The background is a dramatic, desaturated mountain valley with steep gray cliffs, blurred evergreen forest, low clouds, fog, and a cold overcast sky; use shallow depth of field so the man is sharply focused and the landscape is soft and atmospheric. Lighting should feel natural and cinematic, with soft diffused daylight, muted green-gray tones, high detail in skin and jacket texture, and a moody commercial-film aesthetic. Add a large centered semi-transparent white watermark/logo reading OpenArt with an abstract infinity-like icon to the left, spanning across the subject’s chest and face area. Square 1:1 composition, close portrait framing, ultra-realistic photography, 35mm cinematic lens feel, no extra text or objects.
promptEn: Create a cinematic photorealistic portrait of a rugged young adult man with dark messy curly hair, light stubble, sharp cheekbones, intense eyes, and a serious expression standing outdoors in a misty alpine mountain landscape. He is shown from the chest up in a three-quarter pose, body turned slightly away while looking directly back at the camera over his shoulder. He wears a weathered dark brown-black leather jacket with a raised collar, visible seams, worn texture, and subtle rain or dust marks. The background is a dramatic, desaturated mountain valley with steep gray cliffs, blurred evergreen forest, low clouds, fog, and a cold overcast sky; use shallow depth of field so the man is sharply focused and the landscape is soft and atmospheric. Lighting should feel natural and cinematic, with soft diffused daylight, muted green-gray tones, high detail in skin and jacket texture, and a moody commercial-film aesthetic. Add a large centered semi-transparent white watermark/logo reading OpenArt with an abstract infinity-like icon to the left, spanning across the subject’s chest and face area. Square 1:1 composition, close portrait framing, ultra-realistic photography, 35mm cinematic lens feel, no extra text or objects.
promptZh: 创作一张电影级写实人像，主角为 一位年轻男性，留着深色凌乱卷发，带有浅胡茬，颧骨轮廓分明，眼神犀利，表情严肃，背景为雾气弥漫的高山景观。画面采用半身像构图，主角呈四分之三侧身姿态，身体微微转开，同时转头越过肩膀直视镜头。他身穿一件做旧的深棕黑色皮夹克，领口立起，缝线清晰，质感磨损，并带有细微的雨水或灰尘痕迹。背景是戏剧性的、低饱和度的山谷，有着陡峭的灰色悬崖、模糊的常青森林、低垂的云层、浓雾以及阴冷的天空；使用浅景深效果，使人物焦点清晰，背景柔和且富有氛围感。光线应自然且具有电影感，采用柔和的漫射日光，色调为柔和的灰绿色，皮肤和夹克纹理细节丰富，呈现出一种情绪化的商业电影美学。在画面中心添加一个大型半透明白色水印/Logo，文字为 OpenArt，左侧配有一个抽象的类似无限符号的图标，横跨在主体的胸部和面部区域。1:1 正方形构图，特写人像取景，超写实摄影风格，35mm 电影镜头质感，不包含额外文字或物体。
